_note: Pre-migration network allowlist for greywall sandbox in semi-locked mode. Derived from src/stores/settings.ts (DEFAULT_NETWORK_ALLOWLIST + CLAUDE_REQUIRED_DOMAINS), not from src/engine/claude/sandbox.greywall.ts directly — the greywall provider receives this list at runtime via syncRules() and is independent of mode (the mode controls toolchain *profiles*, not host filtering).

_source.behavior: Returns DEFAULT_NETWORK_ALLOWLIST (which already includes CLAUDE_REQUIRED_DOMAINS) when no per-build settings.json override is present. User overrides are merged with CLAUDE_REQUIRED_DOMAINS. Wildcard '*' returns [].

_phase3_assertion: Phase 3's buildSandboxPolicy('semi-locked') must produce a network_allowlist whose host set is a subset of (or equal to) this list. No new hosts appear without an explicit code-comment justification in sandbox.policy.ts.
